knowledgeNodes.title: Thinking Humanly: Cognitive Modeling
knowledgeNodes.summary: Model human thought by combining introspection, experiments and brain imaging with computational theories.
knowledgeNodes.learningObjective: Explain how cognitive science and AI co-develop via testable models.
commonErrors: Confusing good task performance with cognitive plausibility
verificationSteps: Compare model reasoning trace with human subject behavior

sourceNodes.title: AIMA 4e 1.1.2 Thinking Humanly: The Cognitive Modeling Approach
sourceNodes.summary: Describes cognitive science methods and relation to AI models.

edges.reason: Core definition and methods are introduced in AIMA 1.1.2.
Section 1.1 provides the four-approach umbrella context.
